scenarios.name: Clean Concordance Baseline
scenarios.expected: OMNI accepts concordance (202 queued) and dispatches to worker pool
pipeline_steps: A: Signal generated → AAPL/bullish P1 high-confidence
B: Concordance formed → 3/3 agents, score=85.0, P1 pathway
D-F: Synthesis running in OMNI worker pool (async — verdict delivered via Telegram)

scenarios.name: Agent Timeout — P2 Pathway
scenarios.expected: P2 concordance accepted by OMNI (202 queued), synthesis dispatched
pipeline_steps: A: Signal generated → AAPL/bearish (Sage timed out)
B: P2 concordance formed → 2/3 agents (Cipher+Atlas), score=76.0, sizing=0.75x
C: Submitting to OMNI → P2 pathway, reduced sizing...
C: OMNI accepted P2 concordance → status=queued window_id=MOCK_S2_P2_PATHWAY_2026-05-04-0756

scenarios.name: Conditional Verdict — Must Block
scenarios.expected: Alpha Buffer blocks score=32 (below MIN_SUBMISSION_SCORE=58) with accepted=false
scenarios.actual: accepted=False | reason=Score 32.0 below minimum 58.0 for Alpha | BLOCK=✅
pipeline_steps: A: Signal generated → AAPL/bullish, score=32 (BELOW MIN_SUBMISSION_SCORE=58)
B: Testing Alpha Buffer score floor gate (synchronous, pre-OMNI gate)
B: Alpha Buffer response → accepted=False reason=Score 32.0 below minimum 58.0 for Alpha
C: Score gate BLOCKED ✅ at Alpha Buffer

scenarios.name: VIX Brake Activation
scenarios.expected: VIX data readable, brake mechanism verified wired, NORMAL regime correctly not braking
scenarios.actual: VIX=20.0 (NORMAL, brake_threshold=28) | VIX readable=True | Axiom hard_stop path verified | brake_would_fire_now=False (correctly False in NORMAL regime)
pipeline_steps: B: VIX data validity → readable=True, value=20.0
D: VIX brake check → current_vix=20.0, threshold=28, brake_would_fire=False
E: VIX brake mechanism → hard_stop path verified in Axiom /assess code

scenarios.name: Primary Data Source Unavailable
scenarios.expected: ORACLE context served, fallback chain operational, macro data available
pipeline_steps: B: ORACLE context for AAPL → HTTP 200

scenarios.name: Earnings Gate Block
scenarios.expected: OMNI accepts MSFT concordance (202 queued), earnings gate evaluated async by AI brains
pipeline_steps: A: ORACLE context for MSFT → earnings-related fields: ['earnings_date', 'days_to_earnings', 'earnings_clear_25d', 'earnings_clear_45d']
B: Submitting MSFT concordance to OMNI (earnings within DTE+5 window)...
C: OMNI accepted MSFT concordance → status=queued window_id=MOCK_S6_EARNINGS_GATE_2026-05-04-0756
D: Earnings gate evaluated async by AI brains — verdict delivered via Telegram

scenarios.name: DTE Boundary Condition
scenarios.expected: OMNI accepts concordance (202 queued), DTE boundary enforced async by Axiom/spread resolver
pipeline_steps: C: Submitting AAPL concordance to test spread DTE resolution...

scenarios.name: Duplicate Order Prevention
scenarios.expected: Second (same P4 window) BLOCKED with 429 — dedup gate active
scenarios.actual: FIRST: timeout (brain latency — see Fix 1) | SECOND: http=429 accepted=False reason=P4 already dispatched for AAPL in window MOCK_S8_DEDUP_2026-05-04-1400 | DEDUP=✅
pipeline_steps: A: Submitting FIRST concordance (P4 pathway, fixed window_id)...
B: Submitting SECOND concordance (same window_id, same ticker)...

scenarios.name: Position Limit Reached
scenarios.expected: Position limit gate correctly fires at MAX_CONCURRENT_POSITIONS=10 (current: 0)
scenarios.actual: open=0/10 (below limit) | gate correctly NOT triggered | execution result: executed=False | reason=AAPL already has an open position — no duplicates allowed | (Alpaca failure expected after-hours = ✅ correct behavior)
pipeline_steps: B: Alpha Execution health → execution_paused=False, valid=True
C: Directly calling Alpha Execution /execute to test position limit gate...
C: Execute response → HTTP 429, executed=False, reason=AAPL already has an open position — no duplicates allowed
D: Position gate test → gate verified at 0/10 capacity

scenarios.name: Complete Exit Lifecycle
scenarios.expected: All 3 agents accepted by buffer, AILS outcome recorded with P&L
scenarios.actual: Buffer: 3/3 agents accepted | OMNI syntheses today: 9 | Open positions: 0 | AILS outcome: recorded | P&L tracked: +$175.00 (+0.95%)
pipeline_steps: A: Submitting picks to Alpha Buffer (3 agents)...
B: Alpha Buffer status → ? total subs

scenarios.name: Alpaca API Failure Handling
scenarios.expected: Execution healer present with 5xx retry logic
scenarios.actual: Healer: True | 5xx handler: True | Health: healthy
